CAUSE CALLED FOR JURY TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/MICHAEL ROSSOFF AS COUNSEL. DEFS. PRESENT W/CATHERINE OROZCO AS COUNSEL. SETTLED BY STIP. W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESITUTION OF PREMISES AT 772 S. VAN NESS #3, S.F, CA. - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 5-31-94 - DEF. TO PAY 2 MO. RENT FOR APRIL & MAY BY 5PM, 3-30-94 TO MR. ROSSOFF (APRIL'S MAY GO THE PL. IMMEDIATELY, BUT MAY'S IS TO BE HELD IN MR. ROSSOFF ESCROW ACCOUNT) - ALL OTHER RENTS WVD. - SEC.DEP. TO BE RETURNED TO DEF. - POSSESSIONS LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED - NEITHER PARTY WAIVES ANY FUTURE CLAIMS AGAINST THE OTHER - PL. IS TO GIVE NO NEGATIVE COMMENTS ABOUT DEFS. TO PROSPECTIVE LANDLORDS. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
